mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_file ( id, session_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, status, parse_status, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{filename}, #{originalFilename}, #{mimeType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{storagePath}, #{status}, #{parseStatus}, COALESCE(CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, status, parse_status, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_file WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, session_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, status, parse_status, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session_file WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_session_file
session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid),
filename = #{filename},
original_filename = #{originalFilename},
mime_type = #{mimeType},
size_bytes = #{sizeBytes},
storage_path = #{storagePath},
status = #{status},
parse_status = #{parseStatus},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_session_file WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
